first_content_click_attacks.target: Real pages with pos <=20, impressions >0, 0 clicks
first_content_click_attacks.rule: Only improve CTA, FAQ, or internal links. Do not change title/meta unless cooldown expired.

internal_links_to_real_pages.target: Real parent calculators, decisions, guides, blogs
internal_links_to_real_pages.rule: No thin tools/scenarios. Contextual only. Log every link.

group_c_parent_strengthening.rule: Internal links from indexed pages only. Do not touch thin variants.

authority_sprint_preparation.rule: Prepare outreach materials, prospect lists, widget pitches. Do not send before due date.

outreach_followups_when_due.rule: Send only on scheduled date. Max 12 per batch. Track replies.

indexing_monitoring.rule: Check URL Inspection on scheduled recheck days only. Do not re-request.

blocked_daily_actions.thin_variant_seo: PERMANENTLY BLOCKED — no CTR/title/meta for /tools/ or /scenario/
blocked_daily_actions.generic_title_changes: BLOCKED — must have measurable reason and cooldown expired
blocked_daily_actions.cleanup_tests: BLOCKED — until data pipeline, template fix, and monitoring complete
blocked_daily_actions.activity_only_reports: BLOCKED — reports must include measured results, not just actions taken

deploy_rules.condition: Only deploy if real page code changes made
